Localization.Description: A user created, modified, or removed a rule

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed the rule "{object.type} {object.property} {object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the rule "{object.type} {object.property} {object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} modified the rule "{object.type} {object.property} {object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
